news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

news.title: Apple raises prices for MacBooks and iPads, as costs soar over AI
news.description: [THE STAR] Apple said on June 25 it was raising prices for its MacBook computers, iPad tablets and other products, citing spiralling memory and storage costs sparked by the rise of artificial intelligence.

news.title: Assured that access to AI tech once provided will not be cut-off: senior Indian official
news.description: [THE HINDU] U.S. assures India that access to artificial intelligence technology will remain secure, emphasizing innovation over regulation in AI development.

news.title: tech rout in Asia and Wall Street
news.description: [CNBC] SoftBank Group plunged, leading a broad selloff in Asian technology stocks amid mounting concerns over the rising cost of artificial intelligence infrastructure.

news.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.
